# List of available ports

The following list has been automatically generated from port definitions available
on the `master` branch of
[phoenix-rtos-ports](https://github.com/phoenix-rtos/phoenix-rtos-ports/blob/master)
repository.

Legend:

* `phoenix` and `host` -- OS requirements
* `[o]` -- optional dependency
* `[!]` -- conflict

## azure_sdk-1.8.0

A C99 SDK for connecting devices to Microsoft Azure IoT services

* **Related doc page:** {doc}`azure_sdk`
* **Defined in:** [`azure_sdk/port.def.sh`](https://github.com/phoenix-rtos/phoenix-rtos-ports/blob/master/azure_sdk/port.def.sh)
* **Available flags:** `longtest`
* **Requires:** `openssl>=1.1.1a`, `curl>=7.64.1`, `phoenix>=3.3`
* **Conflicts:** *(none)*
